verbGlossary.ADVANCED TO: Issue moves to in-progress {target} when a responsible party begins resolution
verbGlossary.RESOLVED TO: Issue marked closed after the coordination conflict is fully resolved
verbGlossary.ROUTED VIA: Issue routed to the responsible party using {target}
verbGlossary.BOUNDED BY: Issue resolution constrained by an assigned due date
verbGlossary.ESCALATED TO: {source}issue past its due date escalated to overdue {target}
verbGlossary.ISSUED AS: {source}-based drawing issued with submitted {target} for review
verbGlossary.RELEASED AT: {source}released for construction use upon reaching approved {target}
verbGlossary.RETURNED FOR: Drawing returned to the originator for revision and resubmission
verbGlossary.ROUTED THROUGH: Drawing passes through a sequential {target} chain before release
verbGlossary.STARTED AS: {source} begins its lifecycle in draft {target} during early design
verbGlossary.PUBLISHED THROUGH: {source} published for team use through a submit-and-approve {target}
verbGlossary.DRIVES: Drawing revision frequency drives the overall resubmission rate metric
verbGlossary.ACCEPTED AT: As-built model accepted by the owner at approved {target} during closeout
verbGlossary.CORRELATES WITH: {source} resolution time correlates with {target} aging metric
verbGlossary.TRACKED BY: {source} coordination meeting action items tracked by response time metric
verbGlossary.SUPPORTS: {source}capture photos support the inspect-and-{target} with visual evidence
verbGlossary.ACTIVATED AFTER: {source}activated for operations after the project reaches closed {target}
